uplink.description: Status report, CO alarm active, normal battery (3.0 V), no high-temp alarm
uplink._note: Oracle: upstream returns COAlarm 'Alarm' (-> air.gasAlarm true), HighTempAlarm 'No Alarm' (-> highTempAlarm false), Volt 3. bytes[4]=1 CO alarm, bytes[5]=0 no high-temp alarm. Covers air.gasAlarm true (gas-detector required key).

uplink.description: Status report, no CO alarm, high-temperature alarm active, normal battery (3.0 V)
uplink._note: Oracle: upstream returns COAlarm 'No Alarm' (-> air.gasAlarm false), HighTempAlarm 'Alarm' (-> highTempAlarm true), Volt 3. This is the TTN status-report example input. Covers air.gasAlarm false plus highTempAlarm extra.

uplink.description: Status report, CO alarm active, low-battery flag set (byte3 high bit), 3.0 V
uplink._note: Oracle: upstream returns Volt '3(low battery)' for byte3=158 (0x80|30); we surface battery 3.0 V plus the camelCase extra lowBattery true. bytes[4]=1 CO alarm.

uplink.description: Device-info / startup frame (bytes[2]=0x00) carries no measurement
uplink._note: TTN startup-version-report example input. Upstream emits Device/SWver/HWver/Datecode (no measurement); we report an error since gas-detector needs air.gasAlarm.

uplink.description: Config-response frame on fPort 7 carries no measurement
uplink._note: TTN ConfigReportRsp example input. Upstream emits Cmd/Device/Status config metadata, not a measurement; we reject any non-6 fPort.
